name: Salmon and Potato Casserole (Crockpot)
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces can salmon, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the potatoes in a greased Crockpot.
2. Sprinkle with half of the flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Cover with half of the salmon.
4. Sprinkle with half of the onion.
5. Repeat layers in order.
6. Gradually add beaten eggs and butter to scalded milk.
7. Stir well.
8. Pour over the potato-salmon mixture.
9. Dust with nutmeg.
10. Cover and cook on Low setting for 7-10 hours.
